heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1852 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for grants under this subchapter, such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the five succeeding fiscal years.
notes: Amendments2008— substituted “such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009” for “$2,000,000 for fiscal year 1999” and “five succeeding” for “4 succeeding”.Pub. L. 110–3151998— substituted “1999” for “1993”.Pub. L. 105–2441992— amended section generally, substituting provisions authorizing appropriations for fiscal years 1993 to 1997 for provisions authorizing appropriations for fiscal years 1991 to 1996.Pub. L. 102–325
